debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

proof:
let s := { n : ℕ+ | ∃ k : ℕ, n.val = 2 ^ (2 ^ k) }
  refine ⟨s, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact Set.infinite_of_forall_exists_lt fun n ↦ ⟨⟨2 ^ (2 ^ (n + 1)), by simp⟩, by simp⟩
  · intro a ha b hb h
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := ha
    obtain ⟨l, rfl⟩ := hb
    have : k ≠ l := by rintro rfl; exact h rfl
    exact Nat.coprime_of_two_pow_sub_three_pow_coprime (Nat.pow_pos (by norm_num) _) (Nat.pow_pos (by norm_num) _) this
